metadata.title: Sometimes (12'' Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:33.95] It's not the way you lead me
[00:35.94] By the hand into the bedroom

[00:57.08] As we fall in ecstasy
[00:59.67] Ooh sometimes
[01:03.22] The truth is harder than the pain inside yeah
[01:08.13] Ooh sometimes
[01:11.83] It's the broken heart that decides

[01:18.99] Toy with my affection
[01:24.81] It's not my sense of emptiness
[01:26.93] You fill with your desire
[01:33.37] Climb in bed beside me
[01:35.45] We can lock the world outside
[01:37.52] Touch me, satisfy me
[01:39.32] Warm your body next to mine
[01:42.18] Ooh sometimes
[01:45.99] The truth is harder than the pain inside yeah
[01:50.40] Ooh sometimes
[01:54.33] It's the broken heart that decides
[02:58.26] Ooh sometimes
